LAW AND MOTION 301, JAN-15-2026 RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AND MOTION FOR PAYMENT OF ATTORNEYS FEES AND REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS AND EXPENSES. THE MATTER IS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT CONFIRMS ITS TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ELDON PEI'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN LARGE PART. DEFENDANT HYUNDAI MOTOR AMERICA SHALL PAY REASONABLE FEES OF $20,140 PLUS REASONABLY INCURRED COSTS OF $645.44 FOR A TOTAL OF $20,785.44. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. ORDER EXECUTED AFTER HEARING. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2026 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
Off Calendar Jan-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ELDON PEI's Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Jordan K. Sannipoli, Esq., of Bickel Sannipoli APC, (619) 374-4100, for Plaintiff.
Jovanni Villa, Esq., of Ongaro PC, (415) 433-3900, for Defendant.

The matter is argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court confirms its tentative ruling is adopted as follows: Plaintiff Eldon Pei's motion for attorney's fees and costs is granted in large part. Defendant Hyundai Motor America shall pay reasonable fees of $20,140 plus reasonably incurred costs of $645.44 for a total of $20,785.44. The court credits the hours claimed by all of the timekeepers on behalf of plaintiff and believes that those hours are reasonable for the tasks identified in the billing records. Based on handling many lemon law cases, the court believes the hourly rates are a little high for attorneys and paralegals doing lemon law work in San Francisco and has reduced the hourly rates for the attorneys to a blended rate of $550 and for the paralegal to $250. The court finds that all claimed costs were reasonably incurred.

Proposed order submitted as instructed in the court's tentative ruling.

Visiting Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Payment Of Attorneys Fees And Reimbursement Of Costs And Expenses
